person.userCertifiedLifeSummary: THOMAS CLIFTON, his successor., Rogert Clifton, who was in the retinue of Sir Thomas West, in the expedition of King HENRY V. into France, A.D. 1415., James Clifton, in the retinue of Sir Richard Hastings, in the same expedition. (Nicolas's History of the Battle of Agincourt, p. 252, 253)

zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Clifton Esq.於1378年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾薩爾維其可時，他的父親Sir Robert de Clifton25歲，母親Anne Fenwick23歲。他於1399年與Agnes Molyneux在英國英格蘭藍卡爾澤福頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1442年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾普雷斯頓享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Clifton Esq.于1378年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾薩爾維其可时，他的父亲Sir Robert de Clifton25岁，母亲Anne Fenwick23岁。他于1399年与Agnes Molyneux在英国英格兰藍卡爾澤福頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1442年在英国英格兰藍卡爾普雷斯頓享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Clifton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the very numerous places called Clifton, from Old English clif ‘slope’ (see Cliff ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Cliff
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Cliff(e), Cle(e)ve, or Clive, from Old English clif ‘slope, bank, cliff’, or a topographic name from the same word. The Old English word was used not only in the sense of modern English cliff but also of much gentler slopes and frequently also of a riverbank or seashore.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Clifton Esq. was born in 1378, in Salwick, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Robert de Clifton, was 25 and his mother, Anne Fenwick, was 23. He married Agnes Molyneux in 1399, in Sefton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1442, in Preston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Clifton Esq. est né en 1378, à Salwick, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert de Clifton, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Anne Fenwick, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Molyneux en 1399, à Sefton, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1442, à Preston, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Clifton Esq. 1378 in Salwick, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert de Clifton 25 und seine Mutter Anne Fenwick 23. Er hat 1399 in Sefton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Agnes Molyneux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1442 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Preston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Clifton Esq. è nato il nel 1378 nel Salwick, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Robert de Clifton, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Anne Fenwick, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Molyneux nel 1399, nel Sefton, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1442, nel Preston, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Clifton Esq.が1378年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアサルウィックで生まれた時，父Sir Robert de Cliftonは25歳，母Anne Fenwickは23歳であった。1399年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアセフトンでAgnes Molyneuxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1442年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアプレストンで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Clifton Esq.(이)가 1378년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 살윅에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert de Clifton(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Fenwick(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1399년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 세프턴에서 Agnes Molyneux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1442년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 프레스턴에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Clifton Esq. nasceu em 1378, em Salwick, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Robert de Clifton, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Anne Fenwick, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Molyneux em 1399, em Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1442, em Preston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Clifton Esq. родился в 1378 г. в местности салвикк, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Robert de Clifton было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Fenwick, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Molyneux в 1399 г. в местности сефтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1442 г. в местности престон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Clifton Esq. nació en 1378, en Salwick, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Robert de Clifton, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Anne Fenwick, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Agnes Molyneux en 1399, en Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1442, en Preston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 64 años.
